title: vaccinium uliginosum subsp. occidentale
intro: Vaccinium uliginosum subsp. occidentale, also known as the western bog bilberry, is a subspecies of the bilberry plant that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its high anthocyanin content, a powerful antioxidant that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vaccinium uliginosum subsp. occidentale include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting cognitive function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements and traditional medicine. Vaccinium uliginosum subsp. occidentale can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support healthy aging.
